sanskrit:
ये तु धर्म्यामृतमिदं यथोक्तं पर्युपासते।
श्रद्दधाना मत्परमा भक्तास्तेऽतीव मे प्रिया:॥
transliteration:
ye tu dharmyāmṛtam idaṃ yathoktaṃ paryupāsate |
śraddadhānā mat-paramā bhaktās te ’tīva me priyāḥ ||
literal_meaning: Who / indeed / this nectar of dharma / as spoken / worshipfully engage / with faith / holding Me as supreme / devotees / they / exceedingly / to Me / are dear.
contextual_meaning: Krishna crowns the chapter by affirming that the person who—having heard the roadmap of relational spirituality—actually lives it with wholehearted faith and God as the top value becomes extraordinarily precious to Him.
psychological_state: Secure attachment to a personal Higher Power; intrinsic motivation replaces anxious perfectionism.
trigger_scenario: After months of self-help apps and meditation hacks you still feel empty; you stumble on a small spiritual community that simply asks for daily honest prayer and service—within weeks the chronic ache subsides and you feel 'held.'
anchor_text: Live the teaching with faith, making God your supreme love.
